43-48. MARS IN CANCER IN ASPECT TO OTHERS.
If Mars be in Cancer at birth and is aspected by the Sun, the native will be subjected to bilious
diseases, be splendourous, be a justice in position and be valorous.
If the Moon aspects Mars in Cancer, the person will be troubled by various diseases, will have
mean conduct, will possess an unsightly body and be miserable.
If Mercury aspects Mars in Cancer, the person will be dirty, sinful, will possess a mean family, will
be rejected by his own men and be shameless.
If Mars in Cancer is aspected by Jupiter, the native will be famous, be kings minister, be learned,
charitable, wealthy and be bereft of carnal pleasures.
If Venus aspects Mars in Cancer, the subject will be grieved on account of womens company, be
insulted by women and will lose wealth on account of women.
Should Saturn aspect Mars in Cancer, the native will acquire money through journey in water, be
